projectName: Da Nang Blockchain Hub Member Journey

screens.title: Welcome to Da Nang Blockchain Hub
screens.description: The public homepage introduces the hub, showcases amenities and events, and invites you to sign in or apply for membership.

screens.title: Sign In with Email, Google, or Wallet
screens.description: The unified login page lets you access the hub with email and password, Google OAuth, or EVM/Solana wallets via secure nonce-based authentication.
bullets: Email, Google OAuth, or crypto wallet

screens.title: Complete Your Member Profile
screens.description: On your profile page, you fill in company, role, and contact details, upload an avatar, and confirm your connected wallet so admins can verify your membership.

screens.title: Member Dashboard Overview
screens.description: The member dashboard gives you a snapshot of upcoming bookings and events, plus quick links into booking, events, and profile management.
bullets: Central hub for all member activity
Quick access to bookings and events

screens.title: Book a Workspace or Meeting Room
screens.description: From the bookings page, use the visual day and week calendar to choose an amenity, see available 30-minute slots, and create a new reservation with conflict checking.
bullets: Visual day and week calendar view

screens.title: Discover and Register for Hub Events
screens.description: On the member events page, browse upcoming events, review capacity and waitlist status, and register with a single click so the system can track your attendance.
